--graphql
Content-Type: application/json

{"data":{},"pending":[{"id":"1","path":[]},{"id":"2","path":["findEmployees"]}],"hasNext":true}

--graphql
Content-Type: application/json

{"incremental":[{"data":{"findEmployees":[{},{},{},{},{},{},{},{},{},{}]},"id":"1"}],"completed":[{"id":"1"}],"hasNext":true}

Content-Type: application/json
